segments.speaker: 题目17/18
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Have you gone out to get the food and drinks we need for the astronomy club meeting tomorrow? It's our 1​st meeting of the year. Not yet. I've been working on setting up the outdoor space behind the student center for our stargazing activities. There was more to do than I thought. That actually works out perfectly. I've got a few more things to add to the list. All right, jot them down and I'll take care of that now.
